settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your organization, team, and account.

organization.title: Organization
organization.subtitle: Manage your organization details and preferences.
organization.languageDescription: Sets the default language for your organization.
organization.legalDescription: Required on every Declaration of Conformity and technical file. Fill this in exactly as it appears on your incorporation documents.
organization.legalNameHint: Registered company name — may differ from the trading/display name above.
organization.registrationNumberHint: Trade register (HRB), VAT ID, or equivalent national business registration.
organization.signatoryDescription: The signatory is the natural person who signs the Declaration of Conformity. The contact email is the customer-facing public contact printed on product labels.
organization.addressDescription: Used in the Declaration of Conformity and other compliance documents.
organization.error: Failed to save settings. Please try again.
organization.readOnly: Only admins can edit organization settings.
organization.orgChartDescription: Your team grouped by CRA role. Click a person to manage them.
organization.seatsUsedUnlimited: {count, plural, one {# seat used} other {# seats used}} · Unlimited

docReady.title: Declaration of Conformity is not ready to issue yet
docReady.description: {count, plural, one {# required field is missing} other {# required fields are missing}} for CRA document generation. Fill them below — the conformity workflow will refuse to issue the DoC until everything on this page is complete.

name.title: Organization name
name.body: The trading or display name users and teammates see inside Seentrix. This is the friendly name — it does not have to match your registered legal entity.
name.ref: Internal only. The legally-binding name on compliance documents is the Legal entity name field below.

language.title: Default language
language.body: Sets the default locale for every team member's Seentrix UI and the language used when generating compliance PDFs (Declaration of Conformity, Incident Reports, Technical Documentation). Individuals can override this later from their account.
language.ref: Affects the language of the EU Declaration of Conformity under Annex V — customs authorities in the destination country may require a translation regardless.

legalName.title: Legal entity name
legalName.body: Registered company name exactly as it appears on your incorporation documents (e.g. Acme GmbH, Acme S.A.S.). May differ from the trading name — include the legal form suffix. Printed verbatim on the <g-doc>Declaration of Conformity</g-doc> and every <g-ce_marking>CE-marked</g-ce_marking> product label.
legalName.ref: CRA <g-annex_v>Annex V(1)</g-annex_v> — the Declaration of Conformity must identify the legal person issuing it. Getting this wrong invalidates the declaration.

registrationNumber.title: Registration or VAT number
registrationNumber.body: Trade register number (e.g. HRB 12345 in Germany), VAT ID (DE123456789), or equivalent national business registration. Enter exactly one — pick the identifier your national authority uses to look you up.
registrationNumber.ref: CRA Annex V(1)(b) — the Declaration of Conformity must include an identifier that unambiguously resolves the manufacturer. Market surveillance authorities use it to trace non-compliant products back to you.

signatoryName.title: Signatory name
signatoryName.body: The natural person who signs the Declaration of Conformity. Must be someone legally authorised to bind the organisation — typically the CEO, Managing Director, or an officer with delegated signing authority.
signatoryName.ref: CRA Annex V(5) — the declaration is signed by a person acting on behalf of the manufacturer. An unauthorised signature can void the DoC.

signatoryPosition.title: Signatory position
signatoryPosition.body: Job title of the person signing (e.g. Chief Executive Officer, Managing Director, Head of Compliance). Printed under the signature on the Declaration of Conformity.
signatoryPosition.ref: CRA Annex V(5) — along with the signatory name, this identifies who within the organisation takes legal responsibility for the declaration.

contactEmail.title: Public contact email
contactEmail.body: Customer-facing email printed on product labels, packaging, and the Declaration of Conformity. Must be monitored — market surveillance authorities and end users will use this to reach you.
contactEmail.ref: CRA Article 13(4) — manufacturers must provide a single point of contact for cybersecurity matters on the product, packaging, or accompanying documentation.

website.title: Website
website.body: Corporate website URL. Optional but strongly recommended — it appears on the DoC and gives regulators and end users a second channel to verify your identity.
website.ref: CRA Article 13(4) — not mandatory but counts as acceptable contact information alongside the public email.

addressLine1.title: Registered address line 1
addressLine1.body: Street and number of your registered corporate address — the address on your incorporation documents, not a PO box or shipping depot.
addressLine1.ref: CRA Annex V(1)(a) — postal address of the manufacturer, printed on the Declaration of Conformity.

addressLine2.title: Address line 2
addressLine2.body: Optional second line for suite, floor, building name, or similar. Leave blank if your address is a single line.
addressLine2.ref: Appended to address line 1 on the Declaration of Conformity when present.

postalCode.title: Postal code
postalCode.body: ZIP or postal code of your registered address. Format must match your country's convention (e.g. 5 digits for Germany, alphanumeric for the UK).
postalCode.ref: CRA Annex V(1)(a) — part of the postal address block on the Declaration of Conformity.

city.title: City
city.body: City or locality of your registered address. Also used as the "place" field on the signed Declaration of Conformity ("Signed in {city}, on {date}").
city.ref: CRA Annex V(6) — the declaration records the place where it was issued, which must match an address that can be linked back to you.

country.title: Country
country.body: Country of your registered corporate seat. If this is outside the EU, you also need an Authorised Representative in the Union — configure that on the Entity Role tab.
country.ref: CRA Article 18 — manufacturers established outside the Union must appoint an authorised representative in the EU before placing products on the market.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Manage who has access to your organization.
team.createDescription: Create an account for a new team member. They will need to change their password on first login.

email.title: Team member's email
email.body: The email address the new member will use to sign in. Must be unique across the entire Seentrix platform — if it's already in use elsewhere, the invitation fails. Also becomes the audit-log identity for every action they take.
email.ref: Activity log entries are stored with the user's immutable auth ID, but the email is what regulators see in exported audit trails.

fullName.title: Full name
fullName.body: Legal or display name shown throughout Seentrix. Also printed on activity log exports and appears as the creator/assignee on vulnerabilities, incidents, and checklist items.
fullName.ref: NIS2 Article 20 (where applicable) — audit-ready staff rosters need identifiable names, not just emails.

role.title: Role
role.body: Controls what this member can do. Admin: everything. Compliance officer: compliance-critical changes (entity role, DoC issue, incident reports). CTO: same as Compliance officer minus billing. Editor: products, vulnerabilities, checklist items; cannot issue DoC. Viewer: read-only.
role.ref: CRA doesn't mandate specific roles, but segregation of duties between the person who signs the DoC and the person who operates the product is expected during audits. Pick a role that matches the person's actual responsibility.

password.title: Temporary password
password.body: First-login password you share with the member. They must change it on first sign-in — the must_change_password flag is set automatically. Use a fresh one-time password generator; don't reuse existing passwords.
password.ref: Defense-in-depth — the temporary password is only valid until first login. If a member never logs in, rotate or remove them via the team list.

createErrors.notAdmin: Only admins can add team members.
createErrors.limitReached: Your plan's member limit has been reached.
createErrors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

team.credentialsHint: Share these credentials with the new team member. They will be asked to set a new password on first login.
team.removeMemberDescription: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from your organization? They will lose access immediately.
team.lastAdminError: Cannot change the last admin's role.
team.adminOnly: Only admins can manage the team.

limits.reachedDescription: Your {plan} plan allows up to {limit} team member.
limits.reachedDescriptionPlural: Your {plan} plan allows up to {limit} team members.

activity.title: Activity Log
activity.subtitle: Track all changes made within your organization.

relative.minutesAgo: {count, plural, one {# minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
relative.hoursAgo: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
relative.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

checklist.item_description_changed: edited notes on a checklist item

vulnerability.accepted: accepted the risk of a vulnerability
vulnerability.marked_exploited: flagged a vulnerability as actively exploited
vulnerability.unmarked_exploited: cleared the actively-exploited flag on a vulnerability

vulnerability_report.triage: re-queued a vulnerability report for triage
vulnerability_report.duplicate: marked a vulnerability report as duplicate
vulnerability_report.spam: marked a vulnerability report as spam

incident.user_notified: notified affected users of an incident

conformity.declaration_issued: issued a Declaration of Conformity for

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your personal account settings.
account.avatarHint: Click to upload (JPG, PNG, WebP, max 2MB)
account.emailDescription: Your email is managed through your authentication provider.
account.passwordError: Failed to change password. Please check your current password.
account.logoutDescription: Sign out of your Seentrix account on this device.
